CheckTitle: All EC2 instances have network ACLs or security groups attached.
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices/Network Security
Description: Verify that all EC2 instances have at least one network ACL or security group attached to them to ensure network security.
Risk: Instances without network ACLs or security groups may be exposed to unauthorized access.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure all EC2 instances have appropriate network ACLs or security groups configured.
